title: fragaria vesca proles sylvestris
intro: Fragaria vesca proles sylvestris, also known as the woodland strawberry, is a subspecies of wild strawberry native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce the severity of colds and flu. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca proles sylvestris include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection. This plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
